name: Amigos Préstamos
description_short: Phoenix-based financial institution offering payday loans, installment loans, and title loans with same-day funding and online applications.
description_long:
Amigos Préstamos is a financial institution located in Phoenix, Arizona at 2929 N 75th Ave Suite 03. The company operates as a direct lender in the emergency cash lending space, serving customers who need quick access to funds for unexpected expenses or financial gaps.

The company offers three primary loan products: payday loans, installment loans, and title loans. Loan amounts range from under $500 to above $5,000, with advertised features including a 5-minute online application process, acceptance of all credit types, and same-day funding options. Their website prominently features a loan calculator tool that allows prospective borrowers to estimate costs before applying.

Amigos Préstamos distinguishes itself as a brick-and-mortar lender with a physical location in Phoenix, operating extended hours (10 AM–7 PM most days) to accommodate walk-in customers, while simultaneously offering online application capabilities. The company is listed on WeLoans directory, a lending broker platform that connects customers with multiple lenders.

A critical caveat: the website displays a payday loan calculator example showing a $1,000 loan with $255.62 in finance charges and a 311% APR, which represents extremely high-cost lending. While the company claims to work with customers unable to make payments, the cost structure and product offerings position this as a high-risk borrowing option suitable only for genuine emergencies with no better alternatives. No independent reviews, licensing verification, or NMLS number are visible on the provided content.
pros: Physical location in Phoenix available for walk-in applications during extended business hours (10 AM–7 PM Monday-Saturday)
Online application process available alongside in-person options for convenience
Same-day or next-day funding advertised for approved loans
Loan calculator tool provided to estimate costs before formal application
Multiple loan product types (payday, installment, title) to serve different borrowing needs
Claims to work with borrowers experiencing payment difficulties by potentially adjusting due dates or allowing payment skips
cons: Extremely high APR rates displayed (311% example) far exceed industry standards and most state regulatory caps
No NMLS number, licensing information, or regulatory compliance documentation provided on website
No independent customer reviews or ratings visible on company's own site; nearby competitors show customer ratings
Vague statements about credit acceptance without clear disclosure of actual approval rates or minimum credit score requirements
Limited transparency on fees, repayment terms, and total cost of borrowing across different loan products
best_for: Phoenix-area residents needing same-day emergency cash with no time for online-only lenders
Borrowers who prefer in-person lending relationships and want to complete applications on-site
Individuals with poor credit who have exhausted traditional bank lending options and have no payday loan alternatives available
diagnosis: Amigos Préstamos is best suited for Phoenix residents facing genuine financial emergencies who need immediate access to cash and cannot obtain loans from traditional banks, credit unions, or lower-cost alternatives. The critical caveat is the 311% APR payday loan structure, which represents predatory lending rates; borrowers should exhaust all alternatives (emergency assistance programs, credit union PALs, employer advances, family loans) before considering this option, as the total cost of borrowing is extremely high and can trap users in debt cycles.
services: In-person loan applications at physical location
Loan calculator and cost estimation tool
Same-day or next-day funding for approved applicants
Payment modification assistance for customers facing hardship
